meaning: 白沙瓦[巴基斯坦北部城市]
examples: Crowds of Pakistanis swarm together in a camp at the Government College of Technology in Nowshera, 40 kilometers east Peshawar.
Some people going to Mardan, some are going to Peshawar.
No one has claimed responsibility for the Peshawar attack.
CNN's Zahir Shah Sherazi reported from Peshawar and Joe Sterling wrote and reported in Atlanta.
Associated Press Writers Rasool Dawar in Peshawar and Abdul Sattar in Quetta contributed to this report.
